data.title: Ubiquity Retirement + Savings names James Hobson as new CEO to drive growth in small business retirement platform.
data.description: A financial services and insurtech expert has joined Ubiquity to bolster its small business retirement platform in partnership-focused efforts. The San Francisco-based company, Ubiquity Retirement + Savings, known for its innovation and leadership in the small business sector, made this strategic move on Jan. 26, 2026. This initiative signals a crucial step forward in the company's growth trajectory.

data.title: myKaarma launches AI video grader & tools to enhance video quality, increase revenue. Technician videos can drive up to $90 more per repair order, saving dealerships 25+ hours/month.
data.description: Initial data from a pilot study indicates that the use of high-quality technician videos can increase repair orders by up to $90. Furthermore, the implementation of new AI technology for communications and scheduling has been found to save dealerships more than 25 hours per month. The findings were presented by myKaarma, a prominent company offering comprehensive service lane and payment solutions, based in Long Beach, California. This information was disclosed on January 26, 2026.

data.title: Wahlburgers plans to expand nationwide in 2026, offering its iconic burgers and hospitality to more guests.
data.description: In January 26, 2026, Burger brand Wahlburgers, established by brothers Mark, Donnie, and Chef Paul Wahlberg, is set to expand its presence in the United States during the year. The popular brand, known for its iconic menu and warm hospitality, will speed up its growth strategy, allowing more customers to experience its offerings.

data.title: StockHero releases Version 4; automated trading popular among retail investors. Major advancement in stock trading.
data.description: StockHero has launched StockHero Version 4 in Singapore on Jan. 26, 2026. This release marks a significant milestone for stock traders as automated trading, previously only accessible to hedge funds and institutional desks, is now available for retail traders. This latest version is expected to revolutionize the trading industry.

data.title: Satellogic set to raise $35M in direct stock offering.
data.description: The latest report on the economy reveals that the unemployment rate has dropped to a record low of 3.8%, the lowest in the past decade. Additionally, the GDP has seen a growth of 5.2% this quarter, marking a significant increase from the previous months. The stock market has also shown positive performance, with the main index reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Analysts predict further growth in the coming months, attributing it to various government policies and increasing consumer confidence. Inflation remains steady at 2.5%, indicating a stable economic environment. Overall, the economic outlook appears optimistic with promising indicators across different sectors.
ISRAELI MILITARY SAYS REMAINS OF LAST ISRAELI HOSTAGE IN GAZA HAVE BEEN RETRIEVED

data.title: Faropoint refinances 61 Fund II assets for $273M with Capital One and J.P. Morgan in Hoboken, NJ for better distributions.
data.description: A real estate company based in Hoboken, New Jersey, Faropoint, has successfully finalized a refinancing deal worth $273 million for 61 assets under Fund II. This financial arrangement was achieved in collaboration with Capital One and J.P. Morgan. The primary goal of this refinancing was to enhance the company's capital structure and facilitate more efficient distributions.

data.title: Brave Healer Productions releases The Alchemy of Intuition book by Dr. Tiffany McBride with coauthors.
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, on January 26, 2026, Brave Healer Productions revealed the launch of a new book titled The Alchemy of Intuition: Embodied Practices to Access Your Inner Voice. Dr. Tiffany McBride leads this endeavor alongside a team of coauthors. The book aims to explore methods to connect with one's inner voice, with a focus on embodiment practices.

data.title: Optical ILLUSIONZ opens 7th location in New Caney, TX, strengthening personalized eye care with rapid expansion.
data.description: A family-owned optical provider and boutique, Optical ILLUSIONZ, recently opened its seventh location in New Caney, Texas, strengthening its commitment to personalized eye care just one year after its debut in Katy. This expansion highlights the company's dedication to offering specialized services to more customers. The new location in New Caney started operating in December 2026, marking a significant milestone in the company's growth.

data.title: Uzbekistan's GDP surpasses USD 145 billion, exports rise to USD 33.4 billion, and gold reserves top USD 60 billion in 2026.
data.description: In Tashkent, Uzbekistan, the country is entering 2026 with robust macroeconomic indicators, including a GDP surpassing USD 145 billion, exports of USD 33.4 billion experiencing a 23% increase, and gold reserves exceeding USD 60 billion. The Embassy of the Republic of Uzbekistan in Italy highlights a climate of confidence, reinforced by President Shavkat Mirziyoyev's State of the Nation Address on December 26. International trade data reflects this, showing a positive trend in total foreign trade.

data.title: Shift5 appoints Toby Magsig as President and Interim CEO; Co-Founder Josh Lospinoso remains involved; effective Jan. 26, 2026.
data.description: Josh Lospinoso, co-founder of the company, will continue to be actively involved as the founder and board member. Arlington, VA - Shift5, a platform for Operational Intelligence in America's defense and transportation systems, revealed the selection of Toby Magsig as the new president on Jan. 26, 2026.

data.title: SourcingAI globalizes with multilingual launch, offering support in Spanish, Portuguese, French, and Russian, targeting Chinese suppliers.
data.description: In Nanjing, China, on January 26, 2026, SourcingAI, a prominent global sourcing artificial intelligence assistant, has unveiled enhanced multilingual assistance by incorporating Spanish, Portuguese, French, Russian, and various other key languages. This technology aims to aid buyers in recognizing and assessing Chinese suppliers efficiently.

data.title: Christopher Davis joins Altus Equity Group as VP of Asset Management, bringing 15+ years' experience to enhance portfolio performance.
data.description: A highly experienced asset management professional with over 15 years of expertise in managing various national portfolios, including multifamily properties, single-family rentals (SFR), and build-to-rent assets, has joined Altus Equity Group in Austin, Texas. This addition aims to enhance portfolio performance and operational efficiency within the company. The leader's tenure in the industry brings valuable skills and knowledge to the table, positioning Altus Equity Group for continued success in their real estate ventures. The appointment was announced on January 26, 2026.

data.title: Velocity Financial, Inc. plans to offer $500 million of Senior Notes due 2031 through its subsidiary, exempt from registration.
data.description: In Westlake Village, California, Velocity Financial, Inc. (NYSE: VEL), a major player in investor real estate loans, shared news that its subsidiary, Velocity Commercial Capital, LLC, intends to issue up to $500 million in Senior Notes due 2031 (the “Notes”). The offering will be exempt from registration under the Securities Act of 1933, targeting individual investors. This move aims to raise significant capital for the company's operations and expansion plans.

data.title: Velocity Financial, Inc. announces Q4 2025 net income of $35 million, up 70% from 2024. Stock ticker: VEL.
data.description: Velocity Financial, Inc., a prominent player in investor real estate loans, based in Westlake Village, California, disclosed preliminary unaudited figures for the fourth quarter and full-year of 2025. In the fourth quarter of 2025, they anticipate a minimum net income of $35 million, showcasing an impressive surge of 70% compared to the same period in 2024. Moreover, their expected GAAP earnings per diluted common share is at least a certain amount.

data.title: BMNR has 4.243M ETH tokens, $12.8B in assets. Staked ETH at 2.009M. Owns 3.52% of ETH supply, 70% to goal in 6 mos. Initial $200M invested in Beast Industries. MAVAN on track for Q1 2026 launch.
data.description: Bitmine has currently staked 2,009,267 ETH tokens. The MAVAN staking solution is set to be launched in the first quarter of 2026. With their latest stake, Bitmine now possesses 3.52% of the total ETH token supply, demonstrating significant progress towards their goal of achieving the 'Alchemy of 5%'. Notably, this milestone was accomplished in just six months. Additionally, Bitmine successfully concluded an initial investment round of $200 million in Beast Industries.

data.title: Partnership between Eightco and Futurum Group to launch FOTAP, combining ORBS' authentication infrastructure with Futurum's AI market intelligence.
data.description: Two companies have collaboratively introduced the industry's inaugural AI Trust & Authentication scoring system. This partnership merges ORBS' authentication framework with Futurum's exclusive AI market intelligence and trust services to create a fresh benchmark for assessing AI suppliers. Known as Eightco, this initiative receives support from various stakeholders.

data.title: Neurocrine Biosciences starts phase 2 study on NBI-1065890 for adults with TD, targeting tardive dyskinesia treatment.
data.description: In San Diego on January 26, 2026, Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: NBIX) revealed the commencement of a Phase 2 clinical trial of NBI-1065890 in adults suffering from tardive dyskinesia (TD). NBI-1065890, a novel compound, is being investigated as a selective inhibitor in this study. The exact number of participants involved or further results of the trial were not disclosed.

data.title: HCLTech wins 'Innovation Award' at 2025 Ericsson Supplier Awards. HCLTech stock (NSE: HCLTECH.NS) 585.65 INR & (BSE: HCLTECH.BO) 587.10 INR.
data.description: In a press release issued on January 26, 2026, HCLTech, a prominent global technology company based in NOIDA, India and London, was named the recipient of the 'Innovation Award' at the 2025 Ericsson Supplier Awards. The company's stock is listed on the National Stock Exchange of India (NSE) under the symbol HCLTECH.NS and on the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE) under the symbol HCLTECH.BO. This recognition by Ericsson highlights HCLTech's commitment to innovation and excellence in the tech industry.

data.title: Commvault partners with Google Cloud to enhance enterprise protection, offering features like immutable protection and data search capabilities. Luxi...
data.description: Commvault, a key player in enterprise-scale unified resilience, has introduced enhanced data protection features such as immutable and air-gapped protection, application "rewind" capabilities, and advanced data search functionalities to support compliance efforts. The company, headquartered in Tinton Falls, New Jersey, announced these updates on January 26, 2026. Commvault's stock is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CVLT.
